overall.description: First-person gameplay footage of a character walking along a narrow dirt path through a dark forest at night. The scene is illuminated by a flashlight, revealing grass verges and dense trees surrounding the trail.

agents.ego_description: moving cautiously along the dark forest trail, illuminating the path ahead with a flashlight

entered.detail: narrow winding dirt trail with scattered stones and patches of grass
tall wild grass lining the left side of the trail
tall wild grass lining the right side of the trail
dense silhouettes of trees forming a dark wall in the distance

segments.scene_description: The player walks steadily along a narrow dirt trail through a dense, dark forest at night. Tall grass lines both sides of the path while the beam of a flashlight illuminates the way ahead, revealing the silhouettes of trees in the distance against the pitch-black sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective moving steadily through a claustrophobic, nocturnal woodland. It begins with the camera advancing along a narrow dirt trail, where the beam of a flashlight cuts through the oppressive darkness to reveal tall grass lining the path. As the movement continues, the light flickers across the dense foliage, gradually unveiling the looming silhouettes of trees that stand against a pitch-black sky. The scene maintains this tense progression, pushing deeper into the forest as the flashlight illuminates the immediate terrain ahead.
